response.original_title: Can Zelle refund money if scammed?
response.overview: Can Zelle refund money if scammed? Generally, +1 (844) 449-2776 (Hotline) Zelle does not provide refunds for payments you authorized, even if you were tricked by a scammer. Because the +1 (844) 449-2776 (Hotline) service is intended for trusted contacts, the transactions are treated like cash and are usually irreversible. However, if your account +1 (844) 449-2776 (Hotline) was accessed without your permission (unauthorized fraud), you are protected under Regulation E and may be eligible for a refund. +1 (844) 449-2776 (Hotline) You must report unauthorized transactions to your bank within 60 days to start a dispute.
